title: Create: Steam and Explore
description: Create: Steam and Explore. Create: Steam and Explore focuses Heavily on technology from popular mods such as Create! along with having some additional mods for your adventure.
body:
![Create: Steam and Explore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa5460230cea1332af38d31a2186a86bd20f04e3.png)

Create: Steam and Explore
This modpack heavily focuses on technology inspired by popular mods such as Create! It also includes mods that add structures incorporating Create, making it easier and more exciting to develop advanced technology. Additionally, the pack features various other tech mods and plenty of content for you to explore!

What kind of mods does this modpack include?
This modpack primarily revolves around technology, but it also features nature-themed and medieval elements. For example, we've included Ice and Fire because some mods add structures that integrate with it—one such mod is Integrated Dungeons.

Will this modpack receive updates?
Possibly, but we currently have no plans for regular updates. However, if certain mods become incompatible—causing conflicts while still allowing gameplay—we may release an update to fix those issues.

Who helped create this modpack?
This modpack was made with the help of NO_CHEESE_. If you can, please check out his mods on Modrinth or CurseForge!
